Course Title: AI Chatbots in Hospitality: Accuracy vs Experience
Category: Hospitality & Tourism: Hotels, Tourism, Travel Agencies, Food & Beverage
Who is this for: Front desk staff, hotel managers, restaurant managers, reservation agents, guest services representatives, customer service representatives, travel agents, hospitality supervisors, concierge staff
Team or Dept this is for: Guest Services, Operations, Customer Service, Front Office, Reservations, Food & Beverage, Travel Services, Hospitality Management
Description: Risks of incorrect bookings, advice, or responses.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with day-to-day hospitality operations (such as taking reservations, handling guest enquiries, or managing bookings) is all that is needed to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key risks associated with AI chatbot errors in hospitality settings, including incorrect bookings, misleading travel advice, and inaccurate guest responses. You will also be able to apply practical strategies to balance the efficiency of AI-driven communication with the accuracy and quality of experience that guests expect.
